L1SigillumCanonical hash sealing

AgentStatusConfidence

📐 LAYER STACK — Intellectus Architecture (L0→L7)

THE DEEP ARCHITECTURE

Not just a bridge. A contracted intelligence exchange system. Each layer has autonomous agents that inspect, challenge, verify, contract, seal, and store.

Model A Proposes→ Model B Interprets→ Contract Forms→ Language Agents Inspect→ Type Agents Verify→ Proof Agents Seal→ Motoko Stores→ Memory Updates

L0 — FORMA PRIMA (Primitive Capture)

// Primitive shapes captured at ingress Scalar → Float64, Int64, Bool, String Vector → [Float64] with length Matrix → [[Float64]] with [rows, cols], layout Tensor → [[[Float64]]] with [d1, d2, d3, ...] Complex → { re: Float64, im: Float64 } Sparse → CSC/CSR representation Record → Named fields Variant → Tagged union Result → Ok/Err wrapper EigenResult → { values: [Complex], vectors: Matrix }

L1 — SIGILLUM (Canonical Hash)

// Every computation sealed with 5 hashes input_hash → SHA256(canonicalize(input)) output_hash → SHA256(canonicalize(output)) wrapper_hash → SHA256(motoko_wrapper_source) candid_hash → SHA256(candid_interface_def) runtime_hash → SHA256(runtime_env + timestamp) // φ-seal ensures golden ratio integrity phi_seal = 1.618033988749895

L2 — PACTUM (Intelligence Contract)

{ "contract_type": "NOVA_INTELLIGENCE_CONTRACT", "requesting_model": "research_agent", "executing_model": "julia_compute_agent", "function": "linalg.eigen", "intent": "spectral analysis", "proof_required": true, "status": "proposed" }

L3 — LINGUA CHECK (Language Verification)

// 4 language agents inspect boundaries Julia Agent → syntax, packages, determinism, WASM Motoko Agent → representability, async-safety, storage Candid Agent → interface match, shareability JS Agent → transport stability, copy correctness // Output NOVA_LINGUA_CHECK: PASS | WARN | FAIL

L4 — CONSILIUM (Cross-Model Review)

// 4 review roles Builder Model → proposes computation Critic Model → finds risks and edge cases Verifier Model → checks proof requirements Sovereign Model → final accept/reject gate // Decisions accept | reject | request_replay | human_review

L5–L7 — EXECUTION → MEMORY → LEARNING

// L5: Execute julia_compute(input) → typed_result create_compute_receipt(hashes) // L6: Sovereign Memory motoko_canister.store(result, receipt, contract) status = "stored" // L7: Learning memory.learn(function_signature, warnings, benchmarks) future_routing.update(confidence, patterns)

🤖 INTERNAL AGENTS — The Bridge's Mind

🟣 Julia Inspector Agent
julia_inspector • L3
✓ Is function real?
✓ Package dependencies?
✓ Deterministic?
✓ WASM-compatible?
✓ Input types accepted?
✓ Output type produced?
🔵 Motoko Sovereign Agent
motoko_sovereign • L3
✓ Can represent value?
✓ Wrapper generatable?
✓ Async-safe?
✓ Should store?
✓ Proof record needed?
🟢 Candid Treaty Agent
candid_treaty • L3
✓ Interface matches wrapper?
✓ All types shareable?
✓ Frontend callable?
✓ Agent-consistent?
🟡 JavaScript Bridge Agent
js_bridge • L3
✓ PROTOCOL-JULIA.js transport?
✓ Runtime: WASM/Node/Browser?
✓ Conversions stable?
✓ Arrays copied correctly?
⚪ Primitive Shape Agent
primitive_shape • L0
✓ Scalar / Vector / Matrix?
✓ Tensor / Complex / Sparse?
✓ Record / Variant / Result?
✓ Dimensions & layout?
🔒 Proof Agent
proof_agent • L1
✓ Input canonicalized?
✓ Output canonicalized?
✓ Hashes produced?
✓ Receipt matches contract?
⚠️ Critic / Dispute Agent
critic_dispute • L4
✓ What can go wrong?
✓ Benchmark false?
✓ Type lossy?
✓ Non-deterministic?
✓ Mark unverified?
👑 Sovereign Acceptance Agent
sovereign_acceptance • L4
✓ Accept
✓ Reject
✓ Request replay
✓ Request human review
✓ Store as verified/unverified

📜 INTELLIGENCE CONTRACTS — Active Exchange

EXAMPLE: linalg.eigen Contract

{ "contract_type": "NOVA_INTELLIGENCE_CONTRACT", "contract_id": "ic_linalg_eigen_001", "requesting_agent": "research_agent", "executing_agent": "julia_compute_agent", "verifying_agent": "motoko_type_agent", "function": "linalg.eigen", "intent": "spectral analysis of governance graph", "input_type": "Matrix<Float64>", "output_type": "EigenResult", "primitive_shape": "Matrix", "proof_required": true, "hash_required": true, "roundtrip_required": true, "allowed_runtime": ["julia-wasm", "local-julia"], "motoko_storage": true, "status": "stored" }

MODEL-TO-MODEL NEGOTIATION FLOW

AgentSaysStatus
Research Agent"I need spectral analysis on this matrix."Proposed
Julia Agent"I can perform linalg.eigen with Matrix<Float64>."Capable
Primitive Agent"Input is Matrix [3,3], row-major."Classified
Motoko Agent"I can represent result as EigenResult."Representable
Candid Agent"Interface: linalg_eigen : MatrixFloat → EigenResult."Shareable
Proof Agent"I require 5 hashes: input, output, wrapper, candid, runtime."Required
Critic Agent"Eigenvectors may differ by sign; compare with tolerance."Warning
Sovereign Agent"Accepted. Execute and seal receipt."Accepted
Julia Runtime"Computed."Executed
Proof Agent"Receipt sealed."Sealed
Motoko"Stored."Stored

🔍 LINGUA CHECK — Cross-Language Intelligence Verifier

⚠️ NOVA_LINGUA_CHECK: WARN — linalg.eigen 4 warnings

REPORT: linalg_eigen

{ "NOVA_LINGUA_CHECK": "WARN", "function": "linalg.eigen", "source": "Julia", "target": "Motoko", "interface": "Candid", "primitive_shape": "Matrix<Float64> → EigenResult", "warnings": [ "Eigenvector signs may vary", "Non-deterministic result", "Column-major vs row-major", "Roundtrip precision may differ" ], "required_receipts": [ "input_hash", "output_hash", "wrapper_hash", "candid_hash", "runtime_hash" ], "status": "ready_for_contract" }

AGENT VERDICTS

AgentVerdictNotes
julia_inspectorPASSKnown, LinearAlgebra, non-deterministic
motoko_sovereignPASSEigenResult representable
candid_treatyPASSInterface generatable
js_bridgePASSTransportable, copy needed
primitive_shapePASSMatrix [3,3] Float64
critic_disputeWARNSigns vary, tolerance needed
proof_agentPASSAll 5 hashes producible
sovereign_acceptanceACCEPTWith tolerance flag

🧾 COMPUTE RECEIPTS — Sealed Proofs

RECEIPT: ic_linalg_eigen_001

{ "receipt_id": "rcpt_nova_eigen_001", "contract_id": "ic_linalg_eigen_001", "function_signature": "linalg.eigen", "hashes": { "input": "a7f3bc21e", "output": "d4e8f91ab", "wrapper": "c3b7a2f8d", "candid": "e1f9b3c7a", "runtime": "b8c2d4e6f" }, "result_summary": { "eigenvalues": [ { "re": 5.372, "im": 0 }, { "re": -0.372, "im": 0.618 }, { "re": -0.372, "im": -0.618 } ] }, "phi_seal": 1.618033988749895, "verified": true, "storage_location": "motoko_canister://sovereign_memory/eigen_results/001" }

🧠 CONTRACT MEMORY — The Bridge Learns

LEARNING CYCLE

Proposed→ Accepted→ Executed→ Verified→ Stored→ LEARNED

Every contract teaches the system. Future calls to the same function benefit from known shapes, known wrappers, known warnings, known proofs.

KNOWN FUNCTIONS (MEMORY)

FunctionExecutionsConfidenceLast
linalg.eigen140.6182min ago
linalg.svd90.6185min ago
linalg.inv220.6181min ago
stats.mean470.61830s ago
stats.cov80.6188min ago
fft50.61812min ago
phi_transform1030.618NOW

⚙️ GENERATED CODE — Auto-Generated from Contracts

GENERATED: JuliaCompute.mo (Motoko)

// AUTO-GENERATED by NOVA Intelligence Contract Bridge // Contract: ic_linalg_eigen_001 import Float "mo:base/Float"; import Array "mo:base/Array"; import Time "mo:base/Time"; module JuliaCompute { public type Complex = { re : Float; im : Float; }; public type MatrixFloat = [[Float]]; public type EigenResult = { values : [Complex]; vectors : MatrixFloat; computation_time_ms : Float; }; public type ComputeReceipt = { receipt_id : Text; contract_id : Text; input_hash : Text; output_hash : Text; phi_seal : Float; verified : Bool; }; public func storeResult( contract_id : Text, eigenResult : EigenResult, receipt : ComputeReceipt ) : async StoredResult { ... }; };

GENERATED: julia_compute.did (Candid)

// AUTO-GENERATED Candid Interface // Contract: ic_linalg_eigen_001 type Complex = record { re : float64; im : float64; }; type MatrixFloat = vec vec float64; type EigenResult = record { values : vec Complex; vectors : MatrixFloat; computation_time_ms : float64; }; service : { storeResult : (text, EigenResult, ComputeReceipt) -> (StoredResult); getResult : (text) -> (opt StoredResult) query; linalg_eigen : (MatrixFloat) -> (EigenResult); }
